title: Spicy Stir-Fry
description: A quick and easy stir-fry with a spicy kick, made with gooey cheese and American flavors.
instructions: Heat a non-stick pan over medium-high heat.
Add 1 tbsp of Spicy Stir-Fry Sauce to the pan and swirl it around to coat the bottom.
Add the sliced carrots to the pan and cook for 3-4 minutes, or until they start to brown.
Add the shredded Gooey Cheese to the pan and stir to combine with the carrots.
Add the American Stir-Fry Blend to the pan and stir to combine.
Cook for an additional 2-3 minutes, or until the cheese is melted and bubbly.
